zh-CN.name: 苦瓜
zh-CN.intro: 苦瓜是一种绿色的蔬菜，长长的，表面有很多小疙瘩。它吃起来苦苦的，但是很有营养，可以炒着吃或者煮汤。

story.title: 🥒小兔和苦瓜
story.body: 小兔跳跳从菜园里摘了一个绿色的瓜，长长的，上面疙疙瘩瘩的。它问妈妈：这是什么呀？看起来好奇怪。妈妈说：这是苦瓜，虽然有点苦，但是吃了对身体好。跳跳好奇地咬了一小口，马上皱起眉头：好苦呀！妈妈笑了，把苦瓜切成薄片，用鸡蛋一起炒。跳跳试着夹了一小块，咦，好像没那么苦了，还有一点香呢。后来，妈妈还用苦瓜煮了汤，跳跳喝了一口，感觉真清凉。它高兴地说：原来苦瓜也挺好吃的！从此以后，跳跳就喜欢上苦瓜了。

knowledge.title: 吃苦瓜有什么好处？
knowledge.body: 苦瓜里有很多维生素，能够清热去火，特别适合夏天吃。虽然它有点苦，但吃了可以让身体更健康，不容易生病哦！

en.name: Bitter Melon
en.intro: Bitter melon is a green vegetable that is long and has bumpy skin. It tastes bitter, but it's very healthy. You can stir-fry it or cook it in soup.

story.title: 🥒Bunny and the Bitter Melon
story.body: Bunny Hoppy went to the garden and picked a green, long melon with bumpy skin. He asked his mom, "What is this? It looks so strange." Mom said, "This is bitter melon. It's a bit bitter, but it's good for you." Curious, Hoppy took a tiny bite and frowned. "It's so bitter!" Mom smiled and sliced it thinly, then stir-fried it with eggs. Hoppy tried a small piece. "Oh, it's not that bitter anymore, and it smells nice!" Later, Mom made bitter melon soup. Hoppy took a sip and felt so refreshed. He said happily, "Bitter melon is actually tasty!" From then on, Hoppy loved bitter melon.

knowledge.title: Why is eating bitter melon good for you?
knowledge.body: Bitter melon has lots of vitamins and helps cool your body, especially in summer. Even though it's bitter, it keeps you healthy and strong!
